description.ja: 日本の官公需入札情報をMCPで検索・AI分析するサーバー。
description.en: Search and AI-analyze Japanese government procurement bids through MCP.
description.id: Server MCP untuk mencari dan menganalisis pengadaan pemerintah Jepang dengan AI.

data_sources.name: 中小企業庁 官公需情報ポータルサイト 検索API
data_sources.retention: No upstream documents or attachment files are stored by the server.

governance.human_review_required: Official procurement documents must be verified by a human before bidding decisions.
governance.legal_disclaimer: Results are reference information, not legal or bidding advice.
governance.sampling: The optional MCP Apps view may invoke host-side sampling/createMessage. `extract_bid_requirements` may also use host-side sampling for HTML/text extraction when `fetch_documents=true`; native PDF extraction requires opt-in Vertex AI direct mode.
governance.tasks: Not implemented. Current searches are short-running and synchronous.
governance.authentication: Remote endpoint supports OAuth 2.0 with Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591) and PKCE S256, per MCP authorization spec 2025-11-25. Stdio package is local and unauthenticated.

security.prompt_injection: Upstream bid text is treated as untrusted data and returned as structured content.
security.logging: Secrets and personal data must not be logged.
security.storage: Fetched bid PDF/HTML documents are processed ephemerally in memory and are not stored by the server.
